MINISTRY OF PERSONNEL, PUBLIC GRIEVANCES AND PENSIONS (Department of Personnel and Training) CORRIGENDUM New Delhi, the 22nd April, 1999 G.S.R. 280(E).-ln the English version of the Notification G.S.R. No. 785(E) of the Government oflndia, Ministry of Personnel, Public Grievances and Pensions (Department of Personnel and Training) published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary Part 11, Section 3, Sub-section (i) on 31st December, 1998, at the bottom after the words "Budh Prakash, Director (A T)", the following foot-note shall be added :- "Foot Note :-The Principal rules were published in the Gazette ofindia vide G.S.R. No. 344(E) dated 1st August, 1996." 123201/99 [File. No. A-12011/3/98-AT(ii)] BUDH PRAKASH, Director (AT) Printed by the Manager, Govt. of India Press , Ring Road.
